overview: Live Now Recovery is a privacy-first, real-time marketplace for Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT) provider availability in Ohio. Built on the Internet Computer Protocol (ICP), it connects people in recovery with nearby providers — MAT clinics, Narcan distribution sites, emergency rooms offering 72-hour bridge prescriptions, naloxone kiosks, and telehealth MAT providers — with zero patient data stored. The platform features real-time provider status, geospatial mapping, a volunteer helper network, Cost Plus Drugs medication pricing integration, and a B2B analytics dashboard for counties and health systems.
features: Real-time provider map with 5 provider types (MAT Clinic, Narcan Distribution, ER, Naloxone Kiosk, Telehealth MAT)
NO-PHI policy — zero patient data stored or processed
Cost Plus Rx Router — trackable Cost Plus Drugs referrals with QR codes on every provider page
Recovery Intelligence Dashboard — B2B analytics for counties and health systems with Recharts
Admin verification workflow for provider approval
Volunteer helper signup and management system
72-hour bridge ER emergency toggle for real-time bed availability signaling
Sentinel AI chat assistant with intent-driven quick replies and live provider cards
15 Ohio city location pages with provider card grids
Health Monitor tab with visual site flow map and smoke testing
